name: Aria â€” WORKFLOW B: Retell Call Webhook Handler (v3 Master)
_architecture_note: This workflow is triggered by Retell's call_ended webhook â€” NOT by a human or a timer. It is stateless: all context it needs (lead_id, attempt_number) is echoed back by Retell in the dynamic_variables payload. It handles: answered, voicemail, no_answer, error, and unknown outcomes.

nodes._comment: Parse and validate the Retell webhook payload. Extract call_id, call_status, disconnection_reason, duration, and our echoed-back dynamic variables (lead_id, attempt_number). Classify the outcome into one of 4 discrete states. Throw on missing critical fields so the error workflow catches it.
nodes.name: Validate & Classify Call Outcome

nodes._comment: Look up the full lead record from CRM using lead_id. Workflow B is stateless â€” it has no memory of what Workflow A did. This CRM read gives us email, full name, and other fields needed for fallback emails and Slack messages.
nodes.name: Lookup Lead from CRM

nodes._comment: Merge the Retell call outcome data with the CRM lead record so every downstream node has the full picture.
nodes.name: Merge Call Data + Lead Record

nodes._comment: CRITICAL FIX #3 â€” SWITCH NOT IF: Four explicit output routes. 'error' can never accidentally fall into the retry loop again. 'unknown' goes to ops for manual review. Nothing is silently swallowed.
nodes.name: Route by Call Outcome

nodes._comment: Hot lead alert fires THE MICROSECOND Retell's webhook arrives â€” not 5 minutes later like the old polling system. By the time your team sees this, the lead just finished the call.
nodes.name: Slack â€” HOT LEAD Answered

nodes._comment: VOICEMAIL PATH: Compute retry config. Unify voicemail and no_answer into same retry logic â€” both mean we didn't reach them. Compute wait time dynamically so we only need ONE wait node.
nodes.name: Prepare Retry Config (Voicemail)

nodes._comment: Merge the two no-contact paths (voicemail + no_answer) into single retry decision.
nodes.name: Merge No-Contact Paths

nodes._comment: CRITICAL FIX #3 â€” CLEAN STATE MACHINE: Separate exhausted from retryable. Exhausted leads go to fallback email. Never to another call attempt.
nodes.name: Are Attempts Exhausted?

nodes._comment: RETRY PATH: Dynamic wait time â€” 2h after attempt 1, 24h after attempt 2. This single Wait node replaces three hardcoded 5-minute poll wait nodes from the original. Execution is suspended but NOT polling â€” zero API calls during wait.
nodes.name: Wait Before Next Attempt

nodes._comment: Trigger the next call attempt. Pass the incremented attempt_number back to Retell dynamic variables. When this call ends, Retell fires another webhook to THIS workflow with attempt_number=2 or 3.
nodes.name: Trigger Retell â€” Next Attempt
CRM Update â€” Next Attempt Scheduled

nodes._comment: EXHAUSTED PATH: All 3 attempts failed. Send a human-written (AI-personalised) fallback email. This is the last automated touchpoint.
nodes.name: Generate Exhausted Fallback Email

parameters.text:
=You are an elite real estate broker assistant writing a last-chance outreach email to a lead we could not reach by phone after 3 attempts.

Lead details:
- Name: {{ $json.full_name }}
- Property Interest: ${{ $json.property_value }}
- Tier: {{ $json.lead_tier }}

Write a warm, personalised HTML email body. Do NOT mention phone calls or failed attempts. Express genuine interest. Keep under 110 words. Offer to connect on their schedule.

OUTPUT CONTRACT:
1. First character MUST be < (an HTML tag, no preamble)
2. No ```html fences, no markdown, no subject line
3. Close with a proper HTML block tag

Begin HTML now:

nodes.name: CRM Update â€” All Attempts Exhausted

nodes._comment: CRITICAL FIX #3 â€” ERROR IS NOT VOICEMAIL: Retell returned call_status='error'. This could be: no credits, carrier block, invalid number format, Retell outage. It does NOT mean the lead didn't answer. Sending to ops channel immediately so you know your telephony stack is broken before you lose 500 leads.
nodes.name: Slack â€” CRITICAL: Retell Error

nodes._comment: FALLBACK/UNKNOWN: Something Retell sent that doesn't match any known state. Log it to ops â€” do not silently discard.
nodes.name: Slack â€” Unknown Call State (Ops)

main.node: CRM Update â€” Next Attempt Scheduled
CRM Update â€” All Attempts Exhausted
